description_long: This object is a hybrid form combining the body of a robust, black metal anvil with the appendages of a reddish-brown crustacean, such as a crab or lobster. The main body is a solid, angular anvil with a flat top, a pointed horn, and a wide base, all rendered in a dark, metallic finish. Emerging from the sides and front of the anvil are six segmented, jointed legs and two prominent claws, all colored in a naturalistic reddish-brown with black-tipped ends. The legs and claws are detailed with visible segments and joints, giving them a lifelike, articulated appearance. The overall impression is of a crustacean fused with an industrial object, creating a striking and surreal urban sculpture. The surface of the anvil is hard and slightly rough, while the crustacean limbs appear smoother but still rigid.
description: A black metal anvil fused with reddish-brown, segmented crustacean legs and claws, creating a surreal hybrid object. The anvil's hard, angular body contrasts with the lifelike, jointed limbs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the anvil's face with the crustacean's claws and legs splayed outward, emphasizing the hybrid's frontal symmetry.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pointed horn of the anvil and the layered arrangement of the crustacean's left legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad base of the anvil and the rearward extension of the crustacean's legs, with claws less visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the anvil's horn and the right-side crustacean legs prominently visible.
